17993.description: Fenn Galreach was first described as tall, slender, black hair, green eyes, with bold bearing.

17994.description: Dorn Drenton was first described as tall, heavyset, black hair, amber eyes, with steady bearing.

17995.description: Orin Drenton was first described as towering, broad shouldered, fair hair, green eyes, with calm bearing.

17996.description: Neva Fenwold was first described as short, broad shouldered, silver streaked hair, amber eyes, with steady bearing.

17997.description: Lark Fenwold the 2nd was first described as tall, slender, black hair, amber eyes, with bold bearing.

17998.description: Kira Harreach was first described as compact, lean, fair hair, green eyes, with restless bearing.

17999.description: Odo Harreach the 3rd was first described as towering, broad shouldered, auburn hair, green eyes, with calm bearing.
